title: 🌪️ Lorenz Attractor
name: Lorenz Attractor
what_it_is: A chaotic system producing butterfly-shaped loops—trajectories never repeat but stay within a bounded shape. Classic symbol of deterministic chaos.
how_to_use: looping light trails follow Lorenz attractor paths around her body
aura of butterfly-wing energy orbitals in chaotic symmetry
hair floats in Lorenz-spiraled arcs of soft blue plasma
animation_behavior: Smooth but unstable loops, orbiting trails, sensitive to touch or emotional states—never quite repeating. ---
